en:
Hello everyone! Today, I'd like to tell you a little bit about myself.

My name is Hai Anh, and I'm 8 years old. I'm a second-grade student at Nguyen Dinh Chieu Primary School. My birthday falls on the 22nd of March.

In my free time, I love listening to music and drawing. My favourite singer is Jisoo from the famous Korean girl group, BLACKPINK.

Thank you for listening!
